prompt: Create a cinematic fantasy-romance scene titled Afterglow of the Ball: a noble couple standing together on a moonlit palace balcony immediately after an elegant masquerade or royal ball. The image is a vertical 4:5 full-body portrait with realistic painterly detail and dramatic low-key lighting. On the left, show a graceful woman with blonde hair styled in an intricate braided updo, wearing a shimmering silver-gray ball gown with a deep neckline, long fitted sleeves, ornate lace, beadwork, embroidery, and a wide flowing skirt that pools slightly on the stone floor; she holds one stemmed glass of red wine. On the right, show a tall nobleman with dark curly shoulder-length hair, wearing an ivory-white ceremonial military-inspired formal suit with gold embroidery, epaulettes, ornate chains, a white cape, fitted trousers, white boots, belt hardware, and a decorative sword or scabbard at his side; he also holds one stemmed glass of red wine. Count exactly two people, two wine glasses, one sword/scabbard, and one prominent full moon. Their faces should be softly obscured or turned enough that identity is not recognizable, while preserving elegant posture and romantic presence. Place them at the threshold between a lavish candlelit ballroom interior on the left and an outdoor stone balcony on the right, with carved balustrades, wet reflective stone flooring, warm golden chandelier and candlelight inside, and cool blue moonlight outside. In the distance, show a gothic castle city skyline with towers, scattered warm window lights, dark mountains, dramatic clouds, and a bright full moon in the upper right. Use a luxurious historical fantasy aesthetic, highly detailed fabrics, ornate architecture, soft atmospheric haze, rich contrast between warm interior light and cold moonlit night, realistic proportions, no modern objects, no visible text, no watermark.
